Ürün Açıklaması: G-Wax Dental Modelling Wax has high temperature stability and offers a more accurate try and less risk of distortion in the mouth.  Sheets of Modelling Wax are used by the technician to create the preliminary denture base that the dentist will try on in the patient's mouth.

Ürün Adı: G-Clean
Ürün Açıklaması: A fast and effective solution for impression trays, instruments, and accessories. G-Clean gently dissolves alginate and plaster residues without scratching or sanding. Simply soak for 15-30 minutes, rinse with running water, and your trays will be spotless and ready to use. Discover easy cleaning with G-Clean!

Ürün Adı: G-Dent Liner
Ürün Açıklaması: G-Dent Liner is a light-curing, compomer liner composed of polyacid-modified composite resins and glass ionomer fillers. Its formulation allows for slight expansion, partially compensating for the polymerization shrinkage of composite materials. The glass ionomer content enhances adhesion to dentin, doubling its bonding strength.

Ürün Adı: G-Dent Temp Fill
Ürün Açıklaması: Self-Curing, Eugenol Free Temporary Filling Material Temp Fill is a self-curing, eugenol-free, bioinert temporary filling made from zinc oxide and synthetic resins.  It hardens upon contact with oral moisture and provides reliable sealing with easy application.

Ürün Adı: G-ZNO
Ürün Açıklaması: G-ZNO Zinc Oxide Eugenol Cement is recommended to be used as a temporary filling material and as a primer filler under a permanent cement material.

Ürün Adı: G-Dent Dual Cem
Ürün Açıklaması: G-Dent Dual CEM is a dual-curing, bioinert and radiopaque cement formulated with metacrylate resins and silica/barium glass filler particles. It provides high strength, superior resistance and optimal bonding characteristics. The use of automix tips ensures a homogenous mixture for precise and direct applications.

Ürün Adı: G-Dent Retraction Cord
Ürün Açıklaması: G-Dent Retraction Cord is a non-sterile, %100 cotton cord, knitted into thousands of tiny loops to form long interlocking chains.  Its unique design ensures rapid tissue displacement while preventing entanglement in diamond burs. Available in four sizes (#1, #0, #00, #000), each marked according to its thickness, it provides efficient and precise gingival retraction.

Ürün Adı: G-Dent Gingiva Barrier
Ürün Açıklaması: G-Dent Gingival Barrier is a light-cured, resin-based gingival barrier. It is used to protect soft tissues during whitening treatments and other procedures, as well as for Rubber Dam applications.  With its turquoise color, it is easy to apply and user-friendly.

Ürün Adı: G-Dent Prophylaxis Powder
Ürün Açıklaması: Enhance the power of your treatments with a specially formulated powder designed for gentle and effective cleaning. It ensures through cleaning with soft impacts while minimizing the risk of damage to tooth surfaces and tissues, providing safe usage. Its unique particle structure helps prevent clogging in devices.

Ürün Adı: G-Dent Prophy Paste
Ürün Açıklaması: G-Dent Prophy Paste is an oil-free paste formulated for effective tooth cleaning and polishing.  It is designed to efficiently remove plaque, debris, stains and calculus while preparing the tooth surface for restorative procedures and fluoride treatments.
